name: FICA Tax Credits & Refunds - FICA tip credit refunds

A compliance-first tax consultancy service helping restaurants, bars and nightclubs CPA/accountants learn how to gain tax credits and refunds. Get exact numbers the IRS owes you at no charge. No fees unless you receive a refund, only then do we charge a small percentage of that refund/credit you receive.
